title: Context Assembly, Trust Labels, Token Budgets, Truncation, and Compaction · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in budgeted provenance-aware context builder and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and eviden…
objectives: Label each context item by source, authority, tenant, purpose, timestamp, sensitivity, trust, instruction status, and expiry.
Reserve output and tool budget, measure or conservatively estimate input tokens, and admit context by task-specific value and risk.
Preserve active policy, user goal, approvals, tool schemas, recent results, unresolved errors, and evidence while removing redundant or expired material.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Compaction Regression
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-compaction-regression-va2pi8" that uses case 6395 to assemble context by relevance, authority, provenance, recency, token budget, compaction loss tests, and explicit untrusted labels. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Compaction Regression.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Compaction Regression into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Compaction Regression, keep Compaction Regression connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-compaction-regression-va2pi8
# Competency: agentpy-compaction-regression.
# Case 6395: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: model output and tool arguments remain untrusted until validated.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def evidence_agentpy_compaction_regression_va2pi8(candidate_tokens: int = 18000, admitted_tokens: int = 12000, token_budget: int = 14000, trust_labeled_items: int = 42, unlabeled_items: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_va2pi8 = "va2pi8-8ip2av-6395"
    assert evidence_variant_va2pi8
    evidence_axes_va2pi8 = (
        "authorityva2pi8",
        "interaction6395",
        "tool8ip2av",
        "stateva2pi86395",
        "evaluation6395va2pi8",
        "recovery8ip2av6395",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_va2pi8)) == 6
    if candidate_tokens < 1 or admitted_tokens < 0:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-count"
    if admitted_tokens > token_budget:
        return False, admitted_tokens, "context-budget"
    if trust_labeled_items < 1 or unlabeled_items > 0:
        return False, unlabeled_items, "trust-label-gap"
    if candidate_tokens < admitted_tokens:
        return False, candidate_tokens, "context-accounting"
    assert admitted_tokens <= token_budget and unlabeled_items == 0
    return True, admitted_tokens, "bounded-context-assembly"
